an9.62:1.1: “Monks, one who hasn’t abandoned nine things is incapable of realizing arahantship.
an9.62:1.3: Passion, aversion, delusion, anger, resentment, arrogance, insolence, envy, & stinginess.
an9.62:1.4: One who hasn’t abandoned these nine things is incapable of realizing arahantship.
an9.62:2.1: “One who has abandoned nine things is capable of realizing arahantship.
an9.62:2.3: Passion, aversion, delusion, anger, resentment, arrogance, insolence, envy, & stinginess.
an9.62:2.4: One who has abandoned these nine things is capable of realizing arahantship.”
